cards.style: bg-white border border-zinc-100 rounded-2xl shadow-[0_2px_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] p-6 md:p-8 transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_8px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)]

buttons.primary: bg-[#003CFF] text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-[#002ED6] transition-colors focus:ring-4 focus:ring-[#003CFF]/20
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-900 rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-zinc-200 transition-colors
buttons.outline: border-2 border-zinc-200 text-zinc-900 rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:border-zinc-300 transition-colors

inputs.style: w-full rounded-xl border border-zinc-200 px-4 py-3 bg-white focus:border-[#003CFF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#003CFF] outline-none transition-all

headers.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-zinc-100

image_urls.description: Male creator portrait for marketing page
Profile of creator for storefront demo
Smartphone mockup for digital product representation

iconography.style: stroke-width 2, rounded edges, consistent sizing (20px or 24px base)

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA (4.5:1).
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have visible focus rings.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='checkout-button')

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the pure white base with the single #003CFF accent color.
Do not use generic Inter for headings; strictly use Outfit for headings to give it that premium SaaS/Creator feel.
Use generous padding (p-6, p-8) and soft, large corner radii (rounded-2xl) to create a 'tactile' soft utility vibe.
The public storefront MUST be mobile-first: large buttons, thumb-friendly touch targets, sticky bottom CTA if applicable.
Avoid heavy dark borders; prefer 1px border-zinc-100 with a very soft ambient shadow for cards.
For the creator dashboard, use a clean sidebar layout with maximum screen real-estate for analytics and product CRUD.
Implement Shadcn UI components but override their default Vercel-look borders/radii to match these guidelines (rounded-xl, softer borders).
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
Use the provided image URLs. NEVER use placeholders like via.placeholder.com.
